---
title: "Quality Control Plots"
---

# Quality Control

This document creates additional QC plots and saves them in `../figures`.

## Dependencies

```{r}
source("utils.R")
```

## Packages

```{r}
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(ggpubr)
library(showtext)
library(systemfonts)

font_add("DejaVu Sans", regular = systemfonts::font_info("DejaVu Sans")$path[1])
showtext_auto()

# same plotting theme style as your other analyses
theme_publication <- function(base_size = 18, base_family = "DejaVu Sans") {
  ggplot2::theme_bw(
    base_size = base_size,
    base_family = base_family
  ) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = ggplot2::rel(1.05)),
      axis.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = ggplot2::rel(1.2)),
      legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = ggplot2::rel(0.95)),
      legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = ggplot2::rel(0.9)),
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = ggplot2::rel(0.95))
    )
}
```

## Colors

```{r}
#| message: false
# try your common path first, then fallback
color_codes <- NULL
if (file.exists("../../Metadata/color_codes.yaml")) {
  color_codes <- yaml::read_yaml("../../Metadata/color_codes.yaml")
} else if (file.exists("../metadata/color_codes.yaml")) {
  color_codes <- yaml::read_yaml("../metadata/color_codes.yaml")
}

if (!is.null(color_codes)) {
  sample_type_colors <- unlist(color_codes$sample_types)
} else {
  sample_type_colors <- c(
    "Pigs" = "#4A7C7E",
    "Pig_farmers" = "#D4843D",
    "Non_farmer_controls" = "#B04A7A"
  )
}
```

## Data Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# metaData
if (!exists("metaData")) {
  if (file.exists("../../metadata/metadata_silas.csv")) {
    metaData <- read.table("../../metadata/metadata_silas.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",") %>%
      column_to_rownames(var = "id")
  } else if (file.exists("../metadata/metadata_silas.csv")) {
    metaData <- read.table("../metadata/metadata_silas.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ",") %>%
      column_to_rownames(var = "id")
  } else {
    stop("metadata_silas.csv not found")
  }
}

# metaphlanData_all
if (!exists("metaphlanData_all")) {
  metaphlanData <- read.table("../data/raw/MF_SGB_abundance.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "")
  metaphlanData$clade_name <- as.character(metaphlanData$clade_name)
  metaphlanData[is.na(metaphlanData)] <- 0

  MF_abundance <- read.table("../data/raw/MF_abundance.txt", header = TRUE, sep = "") %>%
    filter(grepl("UNCLASSIFIED", clade_name) | grepl("k__Eukaryota", clade_name))
  colnames(MF_abundance) <- gsub("^X", "C", colnames(MF_abundance))

  metaphlanData_all <- rbind(metaphlanData, MF_abundance)
}

# ps
if (!exists("ps")) {
  if (file.exists("../data/processed/ps_filtered.Rdata")) {
    load("../data/processed/ps_filtered.Rdata")
    if (exists("ps_filtered")) {
      ps <- ps_filtered
    }
  }
}

if (!exists("ps")) {
  stop("Object 'ps' not found. Please create ps first (e.g., in alpha diversity script) or provide ps_filtered.Rdata.")
}

# optional alpha_diversity
if (!exists("alpha_diversity")) {
  alpha_diversity <- NULL
}
```

## Create QC Plots

```{r}
#| message: false
# robust source path resolution
qc_script <- NULL
for (p in c("additional_qc_plots.R", "code/additional_qc_plots.R", "./code/additional_qc_plots.R")) {
  if (file.exists(p)) {
    qc_script <- p
    break
  }
}

if (is.null(qc_script)) {
  stop("Could not find additional_qc_plots.R. Expected in code/ folder.")
}

source(qc_script)

qc_out <- make_additional_qc_plots(
  ps = ps,
  metaphlanData_all = metaphlanData_all,
  metaData = metaData,
  alpha_diversity = alpha_diversity,
  sample_type_colors = sample_type_colors,
  color_codes = color_codes,
  theme_publication = theme_publication,
  out_dir = "../figures"
)
```

## Preview

```{r}
if (!exists("qc_out")) {
  stop("qc_out not found. Run the 'Create QC Plots' chunk first and check for earlier errors.")
}

print(qc_out$p_qc_comp)
print(qc_out$p_qc_detect)
if (!is.null(qc_out$p_qc_depth)) print(qc_out$p_qc_depth)
```
